en.hero.headline: Print Your  Life
en.about.title: The go-to experts for all your printing needs
en.about.body: More Than B&W is a digital printing studio crafting tactile objects since 2012. We partner with publishers, designers and brands to produce booklets, cards, packaging and mailers - set, proofed and finished in-house by a tight five-person team.
en.projects.title: Our Projects
en.projects.p1.title: Booklets & Mailers
en.projects.p1.desc: Saddle-stitched mailer booklets printed for a quarterly subscription program, addressed and shipped from our floor in cream kraft envelopes.
en.projects.p2.title: Cards & Direct Mail
en.projects.p2.desc: Letterpress postcards and business card sets, addressed in-house and mailed worldwide for a brand launch campaign.
en.services.title: Quality prints,
en.services.s1.title: BOOKLETS
en.services.s1.desc: Saddle-stitched and perfect-bound booklets printed on archival paper for magazines, lookbooks and reports.
en.services.s2.title: CARDS
en.services.s2.desc: Letterpress, foil and embossed business cards, postcards and invitations finished to a premium standard.
en.services.s3.title: PACKAGING
en.services.s3.desc: Custom-printed boxes, sleeves and tags. Sustainable stocks, tactile finishes, made-to-measure dies.
en.services.s4.title: BROCHURES
en.services.s4.desc: Tri-fold, gate-fold and bespoke brochures with crisp registration and rich, accurate color reproduction.
en.process.title: From brief to mailbox, in ten days.
en.process.intro: A straightforward four-step process. No middlemen, no surprises - every project is managed by the same printer who runs your press.
en.process.s1.title: Brief & Estimate
en.process.s1.body: Share artwork, paper preference and deadline. We quote within 24 hours and ship samples on request.
en.process.s2.title: Proof & Approval
en.process.s2.body: Digital proofs are signed off, then a press-side wet proof confirms color before we run a single sheet.
en.process.s3.title: Print & Finish
en.process.s3.body: Offset or HP Indigo, then hand-finishing - foil, deboss, perfect bind or saddle stitch in-house.
en.process.s4.title: Mail & Deliver
en.process.s4.body: Packed, addressed and dropped at USPS or freighted globally with end-to-end tracking.
en.materials.title: One quiet
en.materials.intro: A working library of cottons, recycleds and specialty papers we keep on the studio floor. Request a free swatch pack with your quote.
en.mat.p1.name: Mohawk Superfine
en.mat.p2.name: Colorplan Pristine

en.testi.t1.quote: The team treated our quarterly magazine like their own. The paper, the binding, the timing - every detail landed where it should.
en.testi.t1.name: Eliza Hartman
en.testi.t2.quote: Their direct mail run lifted our seasonal campaign response rate by 38%. Print, done this well, still wins.
en.testi.t2.name: Marco Bellini
en.testi.t3.quote: From letterpress cards to a 240-page catalog, every piece arrived perfect. The only press we recommend to clients.
en.testi.t3.name: Sara Okonkwo
en.clients.title: We're proud to work with
en.faq.title: Things people
en.faq.intro: Can't find what you're after? Drop us a note - we read every email personally.
en.faq.a1: There is no hard minimum on digital runs - we'll happily print a single test booklet. For offset jobs, 250 copies is the sweet spot for cost per unit.
en.faq.q2: How fast can you turn around a project?
en.faq.a2: Most cards and brochures ship within 5-7 business days from approval. Bound magazines typically take 10-14 days depending on finishing.
en.faq.q3: Do you handle the mailing too?
en.faq.a3: Yes - every project can be addressed, sorted and dropped at USPS in-house. We can also handle freight for international runs.
en.faq.q4: Can I bring my own paper?
en.faq.a4: Absolutely. Send a sample and we'll test it on press before quoting. We're happy to spec from your local mill of choice.
en.faq.a5: Roughly 70% of our paper library is FSC-certified or post-consumer recycled. Vegetable-based inks and water-based coatings are standard.
en.cta.title: Let's print something good.
en.cta.sub: Tell us a little about your project. We'll come back within 24 hours with a quote and paper samples on request.
en.inquiry.title: Request a Quote
en.inquiry.sub: We reply within one business day.
